trending_themes.theme: Historic Rock in Rio headlining + STRAYCITY Latin tour
trending_themes.evidence: First K-pop group to headline Rock in Rio. STRAYCITY tour announced Sept 2026 across Bogotá, Buenos Aires, Mexico City.

trending_themes.theme: SKZ-PLAYER solo series: Han's Back to Life
trending_themes.evidence: Han dropped 'Back to Life' May 8 2026. Hyunjin's 'LOVER' released March. Members releasing individual solo tracks throughout 2026.

trending_themes.theme: KARMA Golden Disc Album of Year + 40M shipments
trending_themes.evidence: Won Album of Year (KARMA) at 2026 Golden Disc Awards; 8 consecutive #1 Billboard 200 debuts — historic first; 40M+ album shipments Korea/Japan.

annotation_hooks: STRAYCITY Latin America tour reflects K-pop's structural shift into global festival circuit — SKZ bridging gap between K-pop and rock festival cultures pioneered by few
Bang Chan's 237 KOMCA production credits + Fendi collaboration signals member-as-creator narrative that BTS pioneered and SKZ now occupies in 4th gen
Rock in Rio headlining = K-pop claiming mainstream Western cultural spaces that were historically rock/pop monopolies
raw_headlines: Stray Kids First K-pop Group to Headline Rock in Rio
Han Releases Back to Life Solo
KARMA Wins Golden Disc Album of Year
